title: wallet db: insert_note and insert_note_with_witness duplicate 11-column INSERT SQL
description: wallet/src/db.rs has identical 11-column INSERT SQL in insert_note (~line 534) and insert_note_with_witness (~line 817). The code comments warn to keep them in sync on schema changes. Fix: extract the shared SQL into a const &str or private helper so schema changes only need one update.
